notes:
# v0.4.2 — Auto-update sanity patch

Trivial patch release for end-to-end auto-update verification (Phase 2.0 T2.0.10).

## Changes

- README "Release engineering" section reworded to reflect the v0.4.0 → v0.4.1 endpoint migration.

## Why

To exercise the auto-update flow end-to-end: install v0.4.1 manually, then watch v0.4.1 detect this v0.4.2 release, surface the install toast, download, install, and relaunch as v0.4.2.

## Installers

- `ai-dev-tool_0.4.2_x64_en-US.msi` — Windows MSI (minisign-signed)
- `ai-dev-tool_0.4.2_x64_en-US.msi.sig` — signature
- `ai-dev-tool_0.4.2_x64-setup.exe` — NSIS web/offline installer

## Upgrading from v0.4.1

Auto-update via the toast (this is the verification we are running here). Manual install also works if needed.
